data.title: 国际服Discord频道800,000成员纪念礼物
data.summary: [80,000 Discord Member Celebration] Sensei, Blue Archive's official Discord has reached 80,000 membe
data.body:
[80,000 Discord Member Celebration]

Sensei, Blue Archive's official Discord has reached 80,000 members!
Please check your in-game mailbox to receive a special thank-you gift!

#BlueArchive![pBehyyVgH5XWGF4RDhJbJIi2uFeNaUHe.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/pBehyyVgH5XWGF4RDhJbJIi2uFeNaUHe.jpg)
